2: That That thou saidst, My righteousness is is more than God's?
3: And And , What profit shall I have, if I be cleansed if I be cleansed from my sin?
5: And behold the clouds which which are higher than thou.
6: Or if if thy transgressions be multiplied, what doest thou unto him?
7: Or what receiveth he of thine hand?
8: And thy righteousness may profit may profit the son of man.
9: They cry out by reason of the arm of the mighty.
10: Who giveth songs in the night;
11: And maketh us wiser than the fowls of heaven?
12: Because of the pride of evil men.
13: Neither will the Almighty regard it.
14: Yet Yet judgment is is before him; therefore trust thou in him.
